products.name: BookWise OS
products.description: Turn reading into practical knowledge. BookWise OS organises original book insights into a searchable personal learning system designed for reflection and action.
functions: Browse a searchable library of original book summaries
Open detailed learning pages for each book
Organise practical lessons and memorable insights
Build a personal knowledge collection over time
products.audience: Readers who want to retain and apply the most useful ideas from books

products.name: CareerReady 360
products.description: Turn career ambition into a clear plan. CareerReady 360 brings role selection, skills, CV preparation, interview practice, and application tracking into one guided experience.
functions: Choose a target role and follow a structured readiness roadmap
Build stronger CV content and practise interview answers
Track applications, skills, and daily career actions
Measure progress through a complete readiness view
products.audience: Students, graduates, career changers, and active job seekers

products.name: FindMyStuff
products.description: Know exactly where your belongings are stored. FindMyStuff turns boxes, cupboards, rooms, and personal items into a searchable private inventory.
functions: Record an item together with its exact storage location
Search by item, owner, box, room, or category
Add photographs and useful notes
Import, export, back up, and restore the inventory
products.audience: People and families who want to organise belongings and find them quickly

products.name: LifeCompass 15
products.description: Step back, understand where you are, and choose what comes next. LifeCompass 15 guides users through a private 15-day review of the areas shaping their life.
functions: Reflect on work, family, body, money, relationships, home, and purpose
Capture personal situations through guided questions
See patterns through scores, charts, and timelines
Build motivation through small, focused actions
products.audience: People seeking a structured personal reset or clearer life direction

products.name: LifeDocs Local
products.description: Bring important personal documents into one organised private view. LifeDocs Local helps users track what they have, where it belongs, and when it was last used or shared.
functions: Organise identity, finance, property, education, health, and administrative records
Add or scan document records
Track download and sharing history
Search, filter, edit, back up, and review important information
products.audience: Individuals and families managing important life administration

products.name: MyLifeStory
products.description: Turn a lifetime of experiences into a story worth preserving. MyLifeStory guides people through life chapters and brings together memories, lessons, photographs, voice recordings, and documents.
functions: Write memories through guided life chapters
Add photographs, voice recordings, and documents
Organise experiences into a personal autobiography
Create an encrypted backup for long-term preservation
products.audience: Older adults, retired people, and families preserving a personal legacy

products.name: PeopleVault
products.description: Keep important relationships from fading into a forgotten contact list. PeopleVault helps users organise their network and remember when it may be time to reconnect.
functions: Organise personal and professional contacts into meaningful groups
Track the last interaction and communication method
Filter people by company, industry, location, and relationship
Surface connections that may be worth contacting next
products.audience: People managing a growing personal or professional network

products.name: RelationSense
products.description: Understand a relationship through your own lived experiences. RelationSense helps users privately record meaningful moments and observe patterns over time without monitoring another person.
functions: Record supportive, difficult, and revealing relationship moments
Observe patterns around trust, boundaries, reliability, and accountability
Review personal observations through timelines and visual summaries
Keep every entry private on the device
products.audience: People who want to reflect on a relationship calmly and privately

products.name: TourShield Offline
products.description: Travel with practical local knowledge in your pocket. TourShield brings together city guidance, common risks, emergency information, and cultural tips that remain available offline.
functions: Explore destination guidance without an internet connection
Recognise common tourist scams and places requiring caution
Access practical emergency information
Discover attractions, local specialities, and cultural guidance
products.audience: Travellers who want practical city information before and during a trip

products.name: VisitWise
products.description: Compare homes with facts instead of memory. VisitWise helps buyers evaluate every property visit through structured scores, costs, and financing estimates.
functions: Score the apartment, building, location, transport, and amenities
Estimate mortgage payments and purchase costs
Compare saved properties through clear rankings
Track price per square metre and renovation considerations
products.audience: Home buyers comparing several apartments or houses
